privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated VeraCrypt volume created during execution. It has been verified that the expected output target directory is exactly '/home/ga/PortableDrive', the volume name is 'secure_storage.hc' with a password of 'Tr@vel3r2024!' and size near 128 MB. All required files ('veracrypt' binary, 'secure_storage.hc', 'mnt', 'mount.sh', 'unmount.sh', and 'README.txt') as well as the expected volume contents ('os-release' and 'hostname') explicitly match the task description instructions, export scripts, and verifier logic.
